channel.title: ATS on Charlotte's AI Lab
channel.description: Recent content in ATS on Charlotte's AI Lab

item.title: 75% of Resumes Get Trashed by AI Before Any Human Sees Them
item.description: 75% of resumes get rejected by AI before any human HR ever sees them. You sent out 100 applications with zero callbacks? Nobody actually read your resume. Here’s how ATS screening works, why the AI-vs-AI resume arms race is absurd, and what you can actually do about it.
